name: Maverick Force S Profile

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: A78A2D0F-DCF1-427F-82E3-6390521A77F7

comment: Maverick Force S Profile is ideal for small to medium multi-faceted projects in need of seamless color-mixing, advanced optics, framing shutters, and control options in a lightweight frame. Well under 50 lbs, this compact unit features a smart optical system that maximizes the output of 14,000 lumens and provides high-quality color mixing with a CTB filter. An 8-slot color wheel is also added with split-color combinations in mind. Maverick Force S Profile includes a custom framing system equipped with dual axis movement and a 120deg complete module rotation for fast beam shaping. A speedy effects artillery includes motorized iris, frost, focus, a 5-facet prism and wide zoom ranging from 4.5deg to 41.6deg. Additionally, custom gobos created in collaboration with leading designers can be stacked on top of one another for dynamic effects. That is a lot packed in a small frame standing just over 2 ft tall. Control as you see fit with DMX, sACN, Art-Net or W-DMX.

capabilities.comment: Pulse Effect S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Fade In/Out S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Slow Zm Out  Fast Zm In (S > F) - Iris
Slow Zm In  Fast Zm Out (S > F) - Iris
High Col Temp Gobo On - Custom
High Col Temp Gobo Off - Custom
